name: IRC_WHATSAPP_TEMPLATE_B
description: Parent table that stores WhatsApp template details for Recruiting, including names, categories, statuses, and multi-language grouping.

columns.Name: WA_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for a WhatsApp template in Recruiting

columns.Name: WABA_TEMPLATE_NAME
columns.Comments: Name assigned to the WhatsApp template

columns.Name: WABA_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Category of the WhatsApp template. Possible values include ORA_MARKETING, ORA_UTILITY, ORA_AUTHENTICATION

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Recruiting category for the WhatsApp template

columns.Name: DESC_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the description library item associated with this version. Foreign key, references description_version_id in the irc_desc_versions_b table

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_STATUS
columns.Comments: Recruiting template status, allowing suspension from FA without affecting Meta's status. Possible values include ORA_ACTIVE, ORA_INACTIVE

columns.Name: PRODUCT_CONTEXT
columns.Comments: The product context such as HCM_COMMUNICATE, HCM_RECRUITING etc., for which the template belongs to.

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the template was created via content library import, FSM Import, or the UI. Possible values include ORA_CONTENT_LIBRARY_IMPORT, ORA_FSM_IMPORT, ORA_UI

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
